hotel_name: Khách sạn Golden Sun Hội An (Golden Sun Hotel Hoi An)

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Very small room

reviews.title: We were really really disappointed.
reviews.positives: Only the location
reviews.negatives:
The WORST customer service I’ve stumbled upon traveling south east Asia for months

- They’re locking the hotel doors at night and if you what to get in or out you have to wake up an angry guard to unlock it and let you in

- The window we saw in the pictures was FACING THE HALLWAY AND NOT OUTSIDE

- We did our laundry here and really DON’T recommend! 

They lost 2 expensive items and when we tried to talk to the receptionist she was really rude and attacked us like we were trying to scam her. She just said “we don’t handle this case. Finish.” and stopped talking to me. 
In addition, the white laundry came back with all its stains just smelling better as if they just sprayed it with perfume.
When we asked for a partial refund because the clothes were not clean (and we needed to wash them again some place else), they argued with us and eventually gave us back some of the money - making sure we know the hotel will not give it back and it’s from the employee pocket 
WE DIDNT RECEIVE THE SERVICE WE PAID FOR 

- It’s the first hotel I’ve been to that didn’t offer free drinking water in the room - they only had it in the mini bar (and it costs triple from what you’ll get on the street) 

-the shower head wasn’t fully attached to the wall making it unstable and the rainfall head was broken :/

reviews.title: The worst hotel experience of my life
reviews.text:
After my arrival at this hotel, I was given a ground-floor room. Despite the fact that I had paid for a Deluxe room with a city view, I was assigned a moldy ground-floor room with a strong musty smell, without a window. At the reception, I was told that they would only be able to provide me with a different room after three days.

I refused to stay in such conditions. However, because I arrived late at night and had no immediate possibility to find alternative accommodation, I stayed only one night. During the night, I booked another accommodation elsewhere in Hoi An.

The next morning, the receptionist informed me that a new room was available for me, but I refused it because I already had alternative accommodation arranged.

This was followed by a week-long communication with both Agoda and the hotel. I even returned to the hotel in person during my stay in Hoi An to resolve the situation. To this day, the hotel has not communicated properly, and Agoda informed me that the hotel rejected my refund request for the remaining five nights, which had already been paid for.

Therefore, I strongly do not recommend this accommodation. It was one of the worst hotel rooms I have ever experienced, and the hotel’s attitude toward a paying customer is unacceptable. I have never experienced worse treatment.

reviews.title: Scary place, don’t go
reviews.positives: I have to say this is the worst hotel we stayed at. During our stay our air conditioning dripped like crazy, we got the room right behind the reception which had no windows and no sound proofing so we could hear any thing from check ins to the receptioninst tiktoks, our friends booked a triple room and received only two small beds, the shower sucked, during our stay a girls room got completely flooded and their things were destroyed they had to change rooms in the middle of the night to a different hotel because they would not give them another room, also they didn’t give them a refund all of which we had to learn from the screaming fight in the lobby which we heard in great detail. The manager acts like a criminal, terrible room, terrible staff and just over all what the hell?!.
reviews.negatives: Every thing

reviews.title: Beware of scooter scam and average room with poor staff
reviews.text: Scooty scam experience — a broken, rusted phone holder was already attached to the bike, yet we were forced to pay the owner by receptionist despite clear signs it was pre-damaged. Funny things was that receptionist was saying that due to my strong build, I have broken it. Room also had heavy dampness on the walls. We took the holder to prevent others from being scammed in future. Except good location and low budget,  not much. Not recommended.

reviews.title: Disappointing
reviews.positives: The hotel was not bad. It was in a good location but the room is dark and has no window.
reviews.negatives: The photos on bookings.com showed a window and the room was advertised with a city view and I ended up in a dark room with no window and they could not change it for me.

reviews.title: Ant Infestation
reviews.text: The floor and bed was infested with ants so I couldn’t sleep on the bed.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The location was great but the room was quite small and hotel seemed a little vintage. I think only 1 night is enough though

reviews.title: Equipment availability
reviews.text: The room is located in the city center, close to tourist attractions and markets, making it easy to walk around. However, due to the booking on the app or not, I ended up with a room close to the stairs, which is why there is noise disturbance. The room is small, and the shower head was broken. Overall, I was not impressed with the stay. The doorknob only had a lock, and the door stop lock was broken, which made me feel insecure at night since the room is on the stairway, and everyone has to walk by.

reviews.title: Great location and Wifi but really bad mold problem!
reviews.positives: The location was very good and the place was clean. I liked the second room I had as it was much more spacious than my first room which felt very small. The WiFi worked very well and it was a decent value for the area.
reviews.negatives: No windows. No ventilation. Mold and mildew. The first room I stayed in was very small. I decided to stay less days and upgrade to a larger room for the same price. Unfortunately there was an obvious mold problem in the second more spacious room. You could smell mold in the room and there were many air refreshers as well as water marks on the ceiling and walls. It looked like a fresh coat of glossy white paint was painted over the mold areas. That was a bummer as it is a health issue. The staff was not very friendly and there were a few miscommunications due to language barriers. It was also quite loud at times as the sounds from people coming and going echoed up the staircase. Lastly, they replace the towels every single day which seems extremely wasteful. Perhaps they could give guests the option to be more environmentally friendly? I would not stay there again. If you stay, make sure to get a room with a window!

reviews.title: FALSE ADVERTISING, FAKE PICTURES,, SCAMMERS
reviews.text:
Zero stars. Booked a room with outside window, as clearly i see in the pictures.
They have only one room with windows, and they use on Agoda pictures from this room. 
You will get a room with no outside windows, full of moisture, even though in pictures you can see an outside window.
I found cheaper rooms without windows, but i agreed to pay extra, and get outside windows, and fresh air. 
SCAMMERS and no refund available

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The hotel is conveniently located near the Old Town, within walking distance of the tourist attractions. Additionally, the room is clean.
reviews.negatives:
There was construction happening right next to the hotel, leading to constant noise throughout the day.
Regarding the receptionists, one of them wasn't particularly helpful or friendly.

reviews.title: Wrong room
reviews.text: Was given a standard double room, despite booking a bigger one. The name of room didn’t correlate with room on invoice. Had to argue with staff that the price for the bigger room was same as on website. Was obvious this was a trick they’ve done before. Finally got the room i paid for. Which was fine: simple but ok. Major downside was the translucent door, which made the room very light, making it impossible to sleep past 6am
reviews.response:
Dear Guest, Neal

Thank you for your feedback. We are truly sorry to hear that the room provided was smaller than you expected and did not fully meet your preferences.

We completely understand how important room comfort and space are during a stay, and we regret any disappointment this may have caused. Please rest assured that your feedback has been noted carefully and shared with the relevant department for further review and improvement.

We sincerely value your comments and appreciate your understanding. It would be our pleasure to welcome you back in the future and provide you with a more satisfying experience.

Best regards,
Hotel Team

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: pretty near the center of sa pa, the room was quite nice and the price is exceptional
reviews.negatives: there are some improvement to do with cleaning and the breakfast wasn't really a thing if you don't like having savory foods but we cannot complain for the price

reviews.title: Hotel
reviews.text: Rooms cleaned regularly, constant running hot water, great location,  yes would recommend and return.

reviews.title: A few hurdles encountered in my stay at Hoi An, staff (Lee) and housekeeping exceeded my expectations, thank you!
reviews.positives: Central location all conveniences.
reviews.negatives: Caters to a young Euro crowd, too loud at late night

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
Good location but no window for some rooms,  slippers and elevator. 

Front staff was kind !

reviews.title: I would like “the unlike things” can be improved! Thank you very much for your service!
reviews.positives: The location, the staffs
reviews.negatives:
The window can’t be locked!
The air conditioner; I was very confused to control the temperature in the room!  Therefore, very hot during the day, but very cold during the night!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The shower gel smelt very bad.

reviews.title: It was a great place to stay
reviews.positives: Location

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Great for budget travelers

reviews.title: Great location and value. Wonderful staff💕
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Some noise in the morning and evenings from traffic

reviews.title: Moldy and loud
reviews.text: The location was fantastic and the staff were very friendly and helpful but the mold issues were terrible and the street noise in the morning was overwhelming. A street vendor selling coconuts would play a repetitive message very very loudly in the morning around 8am every day which made it impossible to sleep in at all even with ear plugs. I would not stay here again.
reviews.response: We are really sorry for your bad experiences at the hotel before. Currently, GOLDEN SUN hotel has changed to a new owner, committed to the quality of service, facilities and our service quality will certainly make you satisfied. We look forward to your return, so that we have the opportunity to serve you better. Sincerely thank you!

reviews.title: Lovely hotel in great location
reviews.positives: Great location, just out of the way enough so that it was out of the chaos but close enough to the main areas. The staff were lovely. The room was clean, we had a big TV with Netflix which was great after a long day out. The  bed and pillows were really comfortable. Aircon worked a treat. Clean and spacious shower. Bakery and nice coffee shop just round the corner.
reviews.negatives: The shower was a little temperamental as it would be very hot one minute and freezing the next & didn't drain properly when the water was on.

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text: Walkable distance to nearest attractions

reviews.title: The staff were amazing they went out of their way to accomodate me
reviews.positives: Location was great, within walking dustance to everything i wanted to do and see
reviews.negatives: The bathroom

reviews.title: Decent room. Great location
reviews.text: The location is super convenient. The staff was extremely friendly. The room was clean but damp & humid. Also it was a bit dark inside since there was only a window in the bathroom. The bedroom window was facing the corridor

reviews.title: Highly recommended
reviews.positives: Attention was incredibly, definitely, they did my trip a better experience, and the hotel was very clear and close to all the highlights

reviews.title: good location, good price
reviews.text:
Good location! Just 1 minute away from the famous Banh Mi place and a short walk to the Ancient Town.

I booked the room thinking it had a window — turns out it faces the corridor, haha

The toilet is clean, and they provided a few mini shampoo sachets. The aircon is cold, and there’s even a smart TV

Note: There’s no lift, so you’ll need to carry your luggage up the stairs yourself 

would recommend for its price point
reviews.response: Thank you for choosing GOLDEN SUN Hotel as your accommodation for your precious vacation. Hotel GOLDEN SUN looks forward to accompanying you and bringing you the best experiences in the next times. Sincerely thank you!

reviews.title: Good value
reviews.positives: Good location and Friendly and helpful staff
reviews.negatives: My room was so tiny .

reviews.title: Good place
reviews.text: Good place, clean, great location and cheap.

reviews.title: Everything good
reviews.positives: Good location, Good value, friendly staff and kindly give the travel information

reviews.title: One night stay
reviews.text:
Location was super central only about 10 min walk to heart of old town. Room was clean, staff were very friendly and super accommodating.
Overall had a pleasant stay and would book again.

reviews.title: Podría ser un mejor lugar
reviews.positives:
Su ubicación y personal.

La habitación fue lo más deficiente dado que estaba en el segundo piso al costado de la escalera. Al ser las puertas de vidrio, la luz de la escalera molesta para un buen dormir. Las camas son realmente duras y no cuentan con desayuno.

reviews.title: Strategic location
reviews.text: Room on the top floor & no lift so had to climb 3 storey. Room is clean but no drinking water provided. Aircon not cold even set to lowest temperature. Hotel at good location, near heritage town and st not noisy. Easy to get food (famous Mdm Khanh banh mi less than 5min walk). Worth going back but will ask for room at lower floor
reviews.response: Thank you for choosing GOLDEN SUN Hotel as your accommodation for your precious vacation. GOLDEN SUN Hotel looks forward to accompanying you and bringing you the best experiences in the next times. Sincerely thank you!

reviews.negatives: La ducha, ya que estaba entre la pica y el inodoro.

reviews.title: Walkable
reviews.text: The location of hotel is walkable to nearest tourist spot in Hoi An. I love the most there are plenty of store selling foods near the hotel. If Im going back soon I choose again this hotel.

reviews.title: Ubicación inmejorable
reviews.positives: Ubicación inmejorable, en el centro antiguo pero zona tranquila. Cama cómoda. El personal es muy amable. Pudimos dejar las maletas antes del check in y en el check out.
reviews.negatives: La ventana a la calle no cerraba bien. Y echaba en falta mesitas de noche y también donde poder poner la maleta.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Perfect place to stay in Hoi An! Lovely staff and clean rooms. It’s a very good location and the town is a short walk away.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Ubicación
reviews.negatives: Cierran la persiana metálica por la noche

reviews.title: It was ok
reviews.text: had a single room, bathroom was tiny. WiFi not good, small bar soap, shower gel and shampoo sachets, hot water only works for 2 minutes - for a hotel I would have expected much better. No window in the room, bed and blanket was ok. Had AC.
reviews.response: We are really sorry for your bad experiences at the hotel before. reviews.title: Muy agradable
reviews.positives:
El hotel es muy bonito, el personal muy amable y preocupado de ayudar en todo momento, me asesoraron en la reserva de tours y traslados. La ubicación excelente, tienes de todo cerca.
Excelente relación precio- calidad
reviews.negatives: Lo único un poco incómodo es que la ducha no está separada del resto del baño y cuando abres la llave se llena de agua el baño completo ( eso es extraño pero lo vi en otros lugares de Vietnam)

reviews.title: The location is good.
reviews.text: It's about four stars for the cost. The studio is too cramped! There's no place for the suitcase! The cleanliness is on the good side!
reviews.response: 이전에 호텔에서 불편을 드려 죄송합니다. 현재 골든 선 호텔은 새로운 소유주에게 인수되었으며, 최상의 서비스와 시설, 그리고 최고의 서비스로 고객님께 만족을 드릴 것을 약속드립니다. 다시 찾아주시면 더 나은 서비스를 제공할 수 있도록 최선을 다하겠습니다. 진심으로 감사드립니다!

reviews.title: El mejor sitio si visitas Hoi An
reviews.positives: Buena relación calidad - precio. Excelente ubicación. Magnífico el personal. TRAM, la recepcionista del hotel, es una persona con formación, encantadora y, sobre todo, una gran profesional. Enhorabuena.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
Ihad a fantastic stay at this hotel in Hoi An.
The location was perfect, allowing easy access to all the attractions. The staff were friendly and helpful, making my stay even more enjoyable. The room was spacious and clean, with a well-maintained bathroom. The Wi-Fi worked well throughout my stay. Although the facilities were not extensive, they were sufficient for my needs. The only downside was that the quality of sleep could have been better. Overall, considering the value for money, I highly recommend this hotel for a comfortable stay in Hoi An.
reviews.response: Thank you for choosing GOLDEN SUN Hotel as your accommodation for your precious vacation. GOLDEN SUN Hotel looks forward to accompanying you and bringing you the best experiences in the next times. Sincerely thank you!

reviews.title: Un prix qui change constamment
reviews.positives: L'emplacement était pas mal
reviews.negatives: Le fait que nous avions réservé à un certain prix et arrivés à l'hôtel on nous a dit que c'était le prix pour une chambre sans fenêtre, de là j'ai répliqué que j'avais pris une chambre haut de gamme, alors on nous a dit que nous étions trop tôt et qu'il fallait attendre pour avoir la chambre donc nous devrions payer plus cher pour cela, mais après un peu plus de 3 heures d'attente on nous a donné une chambre sans fenêtre et accepter le premier prix et de plus la chambre sentait très fort l'humidité et les murs étaient infestés d'humidité. Sinon après le personnel a été assez sympathique mais je ne remettrai plus les pieds dans cet hôtel.

reviews.title: Great Location
reviews.text: It is walking distance to Old Town and a few meters away from Madam Khahn Banh Mi.

reviews.title: bien passé
reviews.positives: personnel aimable
reviews.negatives: clim trop froid

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text: Brilliant location right next to the ancient town.  Very quiet at night so had good sleep on comfy beds.  Netflix on tv and clean rooms.  However when the cleaners clean the room they only provide towels and toilet roll, no cleaning.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: confortable, bien placé

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The actual room does not match the pictures; the window in the actual room is on the corridor, which provides poor privacy. When closed, it doesn’t ventilate well and feels a bit stuffy. However, the location is quite good, within walking distance to the core area of attractions. The front desk service from the staff was also very good; they even checked me in early, for which I am thankful. The room was clean enough, but the showerhead is not functioning smoothly anymore; it's quite old. There is no elevator, so I had to climb the stairs to the third floor, which is not friendly for luggage. Overall, the cost-performance ratio is high.

reviews.title: Excellent

L emplacement. 
La chambre est simple mais efficace.
Propre, confortable. 
Le personnel est adorable.
En cœur de ville, très pratique pour se promener le soir à pied.
L effervescence de la ville vous servira de réveil.

reviews.title: Convenient Hotel with Friendly Staffs
reviews.text: It’s a good hotel inside the old quarter. Staffs were friendly. breakfast was good. recommended for short term visit.

reviews.title: Nie wieder
reviews.positives: Frühstück gibt's nicht. Personal kann nicht Englisch.
reviews.negatives: Zutritt zum Hotel gerät zum Spiessrutenlauf, da alle Angestellten ihre Fahrzeuge vor dem Eingang parken. Zur Raucherecke gelangt man nur, wenn man die Rezeptionistin ersucht ihr Moped kurzfristig umzuparken.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Okay, it was alright, nothing amazing.  The only issue was those street vendors; they started yelling at 7 am and didn't shut up until 9.
reviews.response: Değerli konaklamanız için GOLDEN SUN HOTEL'i seçtiğiniz için teşekkür ederiz. GOLDEN SUN HOTEL, bundan sonraki konaklamanızda size eşlik etmeyi ve en iyi deneyimleri yaşatmayı dört gözle bekliyor. İçtenlikle teşekkür ederiz!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Das Personal war nett und hilfsbereit mit bspw. Wäsche und Taxibuchung
reviews.negatives:
Es sind dünne Wände und man hört ALLES. Fast 24 Stunden hat jemand Schlagzeug geprobt und uns den Schlaf geraubt.
Das Bett war mehr als unbequem. Die Wäsche war nach dem „Waschen“ nur parfumiert und nicht sauber. Eine Hose hatte danach Löcher.

reviews.title: Perfect spot in the perfect location
reviews.text: Amazing location, and a perfect place to unwind in the busy town. Furthest we had to walk somewhere was 10 minutes. Perfect facilities. Would recommend.
reviews.response: Cảm ơn quý khách đã chọn khách sạn GOLDEN SUN là nơi lưu trú cho kì nghỉ quý báu của mình. Khách sạn GOLDEN SUN rất mong được đồng hành và mang đến quý khách những trải nghiệm tốt nhất trong những lần tiếp theo. Trân trọng cảm ơn!

reviews.title: War okay für eine Nacht, würde wahrscheinlich nicht länger bleiben wollen. Preis Leitung absolut okay. Zimmer eher in di
reviews.positives: Prei Leistung war absolut in Ordnung. Klimaanlage hat gut funktioniert. Personal war sehr nett, die Lage gut. In ein paar Gehminuten erreicht man die Altstadt.
reviews.negatives: Das Zimmer hatte nur ein Fenster zum Gang blickend, es war mit einem Vorhang bedeckt. Es gab ein Fenster im Bad welches so weit oben war, dass man es nicht öffnen oder schließen konnte. Seifenspender war an einer Ecke zerbrochen, sah sehr schäbig aus.

reviews.title: Clean and spacious with a helpful staff
reviews.text: I really enjoy staying here with it comfortable bed very clean bathroom and showers. I mastered the YouTube videos so I could watch English channels and the staff did a great job arranging for the memories show and then a Na Hill tour.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Zimmer war zweckgemäß, die Lage sehr gut und das Personal sehr freundlich.
reviews.negatives: Bei uns waren immer mal wieder Ameisen im Zimmer, was etwas nervig war.

reviews.title: Hotel
reviews.text: The location is just around 300m to centre the Old Town. There's a food street next to the hotel where u can get good cheap breakfast, lunch and dinner. A great local coffee shop that has great salted coffee, just 3 doors down from Ningy Spa where I had a great massage at reasonable low rates. Everything is much more expensive in the Old Town
reviews.response: Thank you for choosing GOLDEN SUN Hotel as your accommodation for your precious vacation. Hotel GOLDEN SUN looks forward to accompanying you and bringing you the best experiences in the next times. Sincerely thank you!

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Die Lage ist gut es sind nur wenige Meter bis zur Innenstadt. Das Personal ist super freundlich und hilft einem gerne weiter bei Tourangeboten oder ähnlichem.

reviews.title: Thank you for a pleasant stay
reviews.text: I booked this online on Agoda approximately 15 minutes before arriving and there was no issues whatsoever. Friendly staff, a very handy location and great value for money. I would stay again.
reviews.response: Thank you for choosing GOLDEN SUN Hotel as your accommodation for your precious vacation. GOLDEN SUN Hotel looks forward to accompanying you and bringing you the best experiences in the next times. Sincerely thank you!

reviews.title: Alles prima!
reviews.positives: Saubere Zimmer, hilfsbereite Mitarbeiter.
reviews.negatives: Der Strom ist in meinem Zimmer immer wieder rausgesprungen, aber das Personal hat mir einen Trick verraten und dann war er stabil.

reviews.title: Great value for Money and location
reviews.text:
Great value for money according to the rooms, location is the best (close to major food spots and market) very well spoken staff and accomodating. 
Room condition also good, price wise also cheap & best. Cleanliness was there. Overall a good find in hoi an.
reviews.response:
Dear Guest, Amanat Kaur

Thank you so much for your lovely review and for your kind compliments about our team and hotel services. We are very happy to hear that our staff made a positive impression and that you enjoyed your stay with us.

Providing warm hospitality and excellent service is always our top priority, and your encouraging feedback means a lot to everyone on our team. Comments like yours inspire us to continue improving and delivering unforgettable experiences to all our valued guests.

Thank you once again for choosing our hotel. We truly hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back in the future.

Best regards,
Hotel Team

reviews.negatives: Le dimensioni del bagno MA A QUEL PREZZO...non si può pretendere troppo!!!

Great location, walkable to old town and home after partying. Also a quick grab to the beaches.

reviews.title: EXCELLENT STAY IN HOI AN
reviews.text: The room is very clean and has toiletries. The location is very near the Ancient Town. The staff are accommodating and communicate in English well.

reviews.negatives: Kakkerlakken in kamer, gang. Reinigen kamer op aanvraag. Gehorig. Geen lift.

reviews.title: Great stay!
reviews.text: Nice cozy place. Great location and staff super friendly and accommodating. Will definitely come back

reviews.title: aardig personeel, waardeloos management

reviews.negatives: het onderhoud

reviews.title: Best spot to stay
reviews.text: Middle of the hoi an town

reviews.title: Heerlijk verblijf gehad, schone kamer
reviews.positives:
Allereerst de ligging is top!
Het personeel is super aardig en behulpzaam 
Voor de prijs die je betaald per nacht  kun je niet beter krijgen…  een fijne schone kamer

reviews.title: Would definitely stay again
reviews.text:
We stayed here and had a great experience.
I guess they made some changes because we did not encounter any of the issues these bad reviews mentioned.
The rooms are extremely clean, there is ac, hot water, mini fridge and clean towels.
The staff is very friendly and welcoming.
The only disadvantage is that one of the room is smaller than expected (it shows it in the pictures with another room that is bigger under the same category and price). We stayed in the smaller room and later switched rooms to the bigger one for a bit more money.
Other than that great hotel, great price and amazing location! Would recommend.

reviews.title: Prijs kwaliteit verhouding top.
reviews.positives: Goede service, meiden van de receptie waren behulpzaam
reviews.negatives: Geen lift.

reviews.title: Would definitely stay again
reviews.text:
Stayed here and had a great experience.
I guess they made some changes because we did not encounter any of the issues these bad reviews mentioned.
The rooms are extremely clean, there is ac, hot water, mini fridge and clean towels.
The staff is very friendly and welcoming.
The only disadvantage is that one of the room is smaller than expected (it shows it in the pictures with another room that is bigger under the same category and price). We stayed in the smaller room and later switched rooms to the bigger one for a bit more money.
Other than that great hotel, great price and amazing location! Would recommend.

reviews.title: Fijn hotel dichtbij het centrum van Hoi An!

reviews.negatives: Enige minpuntje was dat we geen raam hadden en dus geen daglicht

reviews.response: 貴重なご休暇のご宿泊先としてゴールデンサンをお選びいただき、誠にありがとうございます。ゴールデンサンは、皆様にまたお越しいただき、最高の体験をお届けできることを楽しみにしております。心より感謝申し上げます。

אל תתקרבו!!!
התפוצץ לנו צינור המים בזמן שטיילנו ולא היינו בחדר, כשחזרנו ראינו את כל הדברים שלנו צפים במים.
הרבה דברים התקלקלו. למלון לא היה חדר חדש להביא לנו והם העבירו אותנו למלון ברמה נמוכה מזו ששילמנו עליה. בנוסף המנהל האשים אותנו בקרע של הצינור ולא הסכים לפצות אותנו על השהייה הגרועה ועל הדברים שנהרסו

reviews.title: Ngoài điểm trừ là chỗ lưu trú, còn lại cả gia đình đã có một kỳ nghỉ với nhiều trải nghiệm thú vị.

reviews.negatives: Tiện nghi chỗ lưu trú không đầy đủ, một phòng nước nóng lạnh hư, phòng vệ sinh không có phích cắm, phòng hơi nhỏ và không có gương.

Très bon emplacement

L'hôtel GOLDEN SUN a changé de propriétaire et s'engage à offrir un service et des installations de qualité. Notre service vous satisfera pleinement. Nous espérons vous revoir bientôt pour mieux vous servir. Nous vous remercions sincèrement !

reviews.title: Khá hài lòng và sẽ trở lại.

reviews.negatives: Máy lạnh trong phòng không chỉnh được. Khách sạn có chủ động đổi phòng khác.

reviews.title: Bon hotel
reviews.text:
L’hôtel est très bien placé dans le centre d’hoi an !

Chambre sans fenêtre trop petite pour nous avec un enfant mais propre et adapté pour un couple ou solo. L’hôtel n’est pas cher mais fait l’affaire. 

Petit moins quand même : insonorisation zéro et trop de lumière dans la chambre, porte vitrée

reviews.title: Very good

reviews.negatives: Nhà tắm siêu bé, mở cửa ra vào còn không mở hết được. Nhưng đổi lại là sạch sẽ, sáng, thoáng. Nói chung mình đi một mình lại lang thang suốt nên vãn thấy ok.

Deshalb sind die zimmer etwas muffig. Sonst passt es soweit ganz gut. Kein frühstück angeboten.  Personal nett, preis Leistung stimnt.

reviews.text: Preis/Leistung war wirklich in Ordnung, wir hatten einen schönen Aufenthalt. Einziges Manko: die Fenster und Wände sind sehr hellhörig, man bekommt viel mit. Jeden Morgen stand ein Straßenhändler vor dem Hotel und hat im 5 Sekunden Takt seine Reklame durch ein Mikrofon abgespielt.
reviews.response: Vielen Dank, dass Sie sich für GOLDEN SUN als Unterkunft für Ihren unvergesslichen Urlaub entschieden haben. GOLDEN SUN freut sich darauf, Sie in Zukunft zu begleiten und Ihnen die schönsten Erlebnisse zu bieten. Herzlichen Dank!

reviews.title: 위생상태안좋음
reviews.text:
두번째 호이안방문이라 저렴한가격에 이용했지만 냄새심하고 더럽고  방음안되서 시끄럽고 싼값말고는 좋은게없음
다시는이용하고싶지않음
reviews.response: 이전에 호텔에서 불편을 드려 죄송합니다. 현재 골든 선 호텔은 새로운 소유주에게 인수되었으며, 최상의 서비스와 시설, 그리고 최고의 서비스로 고객님께 만족을 드릴 것을 약속드립니다. 다시 찾아주시면 더 나은 서비스를 제공할 수 있도록 최선을 다하겠습니다. 진심으로 감사드립니다!

reviews.title: Một chỗ ở thuận lợi để ăn và đi vào phố cổ chơi
reviews.positives: Khăn và ga giường rất sạch sẽ. Có sân thượng. Xung quanh đều là những quán nhỏ ngon và nổi tiếng, hương vị đúng chuẩn hội an. Nhân viên cực kỳ dễ thương và hỗ trợ khách.

reviews.title: 没热水，窗户异响
reviews.text: 之前来过会安，因为喜欢会安的这家Madam Khanh banhmi，所以定了这家酒店，因为步行去这家banhmi店只需要二分钟，酒店位置在一个十字路口上，早上很早就很吵闹影响睡眠，另外入住的房间没有热水，不能洗澡，直到第二天中午联系前台帮忙换了一个房间，热水问题解决了，不过当晚会安下雨刮大风，换的新房间窗户又有问题不能紧闭，被风吹的一直铛铛响，因为凌晨5点就要起床去机场，只能强忍异响，导致一晚上都没睡着，我一定不会再入住这家酒店，还不如homestay舒适方便。
reviews.response: 我哋對你之前喺酒店嘅唔好經歷感到非常抱歉。現時， GOLDEN SUN 酒店已經換咗新業主，致力於服務質素，設施同我哋嘅服務質素一定會令你滿意。我哋期待你返嚟，等我哋有機會為你服務得更好。真心多謝你！

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: Nhân viên nhiệt tình, phòng mới sạch sẽ tiện nghi

reviews.title: נורא ואיום
reviews.text:
מלון זה לא, הוסטל במקרה הטוב. לא מציינים מראש שהמקום רב קומות (אני הייתי 3) ואין להם מעלית או שירות עזרה עם הדברים. החדרים עצמם מספקים, אבל מים חמים במקלחת יום כן יום לא, סגל העובדים מתנהל מול גוגל טרנסלייט ולא מבינים מילה.
אמרו שיתנו לי להתקלח בלובי בלבד למרות שהייתי מוכנה לשלם, רק שכחו לציין שבלובי יש קו ג׳וקים והם לא מוכנים לתת מגבת. הסגל לא אדיב כי הוא לא מבין אותך.

reviews.title: אחלה מלון
reviews.text: העובדות חמודות מאוד והמלון מתוקתק , הדבר היחידי שיש רעש בלתי נסבל מבניות בחוץ ושומעים את התנועה של כל הרחוב גם אם החלון סגור
reviews.response: תודה שבחרתם בגולדן סאן כמקום הלינה שלכם לחופשתכם היקרה. גולדן סאן מצפה ללוות אתכם ולהביא לכם את החוויות הטובות ביותר בזמנים הבאים. תודה מקרב לב!

reviews.title: Khách sạn tệ
reviews.text: Trên web thì khá đẹp. Đến nơi ngủ mới biết. Quá nhiều muỗi, đêm k ngủ đc. Nếu không khắc phục được triệt để thì khách đến lần 1 k có lần 2
reviews.response:
Cảm ơn quý khách đã chia sẻ phản hồi.
Chúng tôi rất tiếc vì trải nghiệm của quý khách chưa được như mong đợi.
Chúng tôi sẽ cố gắng cải thiện để mang đến trải nghiệm tốt hơn trong thời gian tới.

- Phòng thì đăng lên 20m2 nhưng thực tế tầm 12m2 thui, rất chật, nhỏ, cảm thấy bị lừa

reviews.negatives: A horrendous stay. There were rats in the walls, squeaking and running about. When we informed the security guard he was extremely rude. The manager said we can either change rooms or put up with it. We have had no refund. The receptionist refused to let us shower in the communal shower after saying the day before that we could before parting for a long haul flight. If you value respect, cleanliness and basic health and safety regulations I would strongly advise you do not stay at the hotel.

reviews.title: Du lịch
reviews.text: Gia đình tôi đã ở đó và có trải nghiệm tuyệt vời ! Sẽ ghé lại lưu trú khi tới đây du lịch

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Not like the pictures at all I stayed one night and checked out to go somewhere else, noise was way too loud, door was stuck, piping wasn’t working so was very loud when anyone used sink toilet or shower, air con was leaking on to the floor

reviews.title: IKKE DRA HIT
reviews.text: Vi skulle bo her i 1 natt. Vi kommer til hotellet og møter en resepsjonist som virket veldig lite interessert i å hjelpe oss. Rett og slett som om hun hatet jobben sin. Vi får rommet, og den stanken som møtet oss når vi åpnet døra var helt for fredelig. Rett og slett motbydelig, det gikk ikke Ann å være på rommet. Det var heller ikke noe vindu på rommet, så lufte mulighetene var ikke der heller. Vi går til resepsjonen å sier ifra, hun setter på aircondition å ber oss vente i resepsjonen. Vi kommer tilbake etter hun sier vi kan gå på rommet igjen, og lukten av mugg og dritt er fortsatt der. Det var så ille at vi bestemte oss for å bytte hotell selvom det bare var en natt. Vil absolutt ikke anbefale. Senga var også utrolig liten. Nei nei nei, hold dere unna!

reviews.title: Avoid it
reviews.positives: Location is OK
reviews.negatives: No windows, no ventilation in room nor bathroom. How can you renew the air of the room ?? It’s dangerous ! Super noisy day and night due to staff. Impossible to have have dark room, the door is transparent and there is light in the corridor. Awful

reviews.title: Kackerlacka
reviews.text: Vi hade kackerlackor i rummet två gånger! Våra handdukar var sönder

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Hallway light stayed on all night. With a frosted glass main door to the room. Made it annoying to sleep. Old and run down. Definetly not 3 stars

reviews.title: Super fint hotel som lå virkelig godt
reviews.text: Alt var super fint men der var ikke wifi på hele vores etage

reviews.title: Awful place just don’t stay here
reviews.positives: Not much
reviews.negatives: A lot

reviews.title: Horrible experience ever
reviews.text:
I booked a Double Deluxe Room with a window as clearly shown in the booking photos
Instead I was given a windowless room

The room was dirty humid and uncomfortable
There were many insects mosquitoes and damp walls

The hotel refused any refund and said I must pay extra to upgrade just to get a room with a window

Also be careful with the minibar
There is no clear notice that items are chargeable
Yet they demanded payment at checkout

Very misleading experience
Not recommended

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: there are mosquitoes in the room

reviews.title: Ok but never again
reviews.positives: The location and the hospitality of the staff was top notch.
reviews.negatives: The room was stingy because of mould . Me and my partner found it very hard to sleep and the next day we both woke up with lot of rashes in our body . I am still itching while i am writing this review.

reviews.title: Could be great but...
reviews.positives: Good location, friendly staff, comfy bed, nice bathroom
reviews.negatives:
The wall was moldy (pictures attached). 
The window seems to have no isolation. As it's facing a junction, it's as loud in the room as if you were on the street. You can hear constant vehicles and honking.

reviews.title: Big let down but good okay room.
reviews.positives:
Nice location, clean room. 
Staff is friendly
reviews.negatives:
Booked for 2 nights, upon arrival they said we could only stay for 1 night. They knew another place we could go to, but did not offer any discount or  service because of the mistakes they made.
We could do early check in for an extra fee. We were told after 30 minutes we could check in, eventually we could check in after almost 2 hours… We did not receive a discount or service for the mistake/misinformation.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Perfect location. Close to the city center. Very helpful and friendly employees.
reviews.negatives: Our room had no windows, which was a shame. The hotel is by a busy road, so it was very noisy from the early morning - and when we were going to sleep. Bed was a bit hard.

reviews.title: Could be worse
reviews.positives: The staff were nice and were happy to let us check in late at night. They recommended some great activities. The hotel is in a great location just near old town.
reviews.negatives: We were on the bottom floor. The door had glass stained windows so there was light coming into our room at all hours of the evening. We also had to listen to every person that checked in late or came in late at night which made it quite noisy. The aircon was also broken in our room for the first night which made it almost unbearable. The bathroom was also kind of gross and the sheets were not clean when we arrived.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Really friendly and helpful staff and great location!
reviews.negatives:
We booked a “superior room” which didn’t end up having a window so room felt quite dark and stuffy. 

 Agree with other reviews that the walls are very thin so it can be quite noisy. We were on the ground floor next to reception and could every one leaving and arriving so earplugs are recommended.

reviews.title: Never book when u have family bcz no lift , ground floor no window very humid and mosquitos
reviews.positives: We book three rooms but 2 rooms are on ground level had no window very sfocated and mosquitoes as well . No lift very hard when you travel with children and your room was on 3rd floor .
reviews.negatives: Location

reviews.title: Close to ancient town but not worth the price
reviews.positives: The location is good, very close to the old/ancient town of Hoi An, and near coffee and Banh Mi.
reviews.negatives: The room is old, small and narrow. The walls are peeling off, and the shower room is not good. There’s only window in the shower room - which can’t be closed, and so flies and mosquitos come inside. The door of the shower roon can’t be closed proparly.

reviews.title: Great location and nice stay
reviews.positives: Location was great and staff were friendly. Had a fridge, good aircon and shower pressure and nice big beds.
reviews.negatives: WiFi didn’t work on the top floor, was told it was an ‘error’ but offered no solution. Bathroom door didn’t work on top floor either.

reviews.title: Cheap but not worth it.
reviews.positives: Location was good.
reviews.negatives: The room was not clean especially the bathroom.  The bed was rock hard.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Good room and location
reviews.negatives: Very noisy from outside, some kind of machinery from within the building and people in the hallway. No sound proofing at all.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Nice location and reception
reviews.negatives: Not very clean and weird windows to the hall and tinted glass in the door, lack of privacy

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: The room was only just large enough for the bed and had no window. I've stayed here before in much better room

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Good location, friendly staff and comfy bed

reviews.title: Overall I like it.
reviews.positives: Easy access and walking distance to town.
reviews.negatives: No elevator to the room. Small space in the room.

reviews.title: Decent for the price
reviews.positives: Friendly receptionists, central location, room was a bit small but decent enough for one person.
reviews.negatives: Room was a bit old and not very clean. Door is also not very thick so could hear people in the hallway

reviews.title: Great value for money
reviews.positives: Good location, within walking distance of old town. Friendly staff.
reviews.negatives: Nothing stands out

reviews.title: nice and helpful  staff,  blind room and noisy.
reviews.negatives:
Room without window,  humidity issues in the bathroom , lack of ventilation. 
First floor very noisy because  close to the reception.

reviews.title: Good, great staff
reviews.positives: Clean and cheap, excellent staff
reviews.negatives: Wi fi wasn’t reliable

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
The rooms were small, but it was enough for us. They were clean and had aircondition which was important for us in the heat. The location was also good, not far to walk in to the city. 
The staff was also very kind and helped us with bookings for different excursions.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The staff were very friendly and helpful, with recommendations on where to go and what to do during my stay. The room was clean and the bed was quite comfortable. The hotel is located quite close to the Old Quarter and some well-known eateries which was very convenient for me.
reviews.negatives: The room and toilet were much smaller than I had in mind based on the photos on the booking.com page. There were limited toiletries which were not replenished during my stay, as there was no daily room cleaning done. The room is only accessible through stairs, however I was on the first floor, so this was not an issue for me.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Perfect Geographic Location and good value of money.
reviews.negatives: Noises (street and some construction)

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: The wi-fi didn’t work at all

reviews.title: Solo Traveler
reviews.positives: I liked that I was so close to the old town, walking distance to everything!
reviews.negatives: Came home very late on the last night, found it was totally closed up, didn't know I had to ring the bell to get inside .. they should tell you on arrival that they close the front gates a certain time at night

reviews.title: Place near market . Accessible especially for women.
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Need some renovation.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Everything OK

reviews.title: Good value for money
reviews.positives: Good location in the city and about 5 min walk from the old side of the city. Banh mi queen is right down the road and a must try. Staff friendly and helpful in booking activities and taxis. The Bay Mau cooking class is really good and worth it! Go to MOT for cau lau and pho!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Very helpful and friendly staff, convenient location - close to the old town.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Good location near the old town, kind staff.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Staff were so so lovely helped us get taxi anywhere we wanted and overall were so friendly

reviews.title: Great hotel great value and a really nice stay
reviews.positives:
Clean and modern, rooms were comfortable and location was great 
Staff were friendly and helpful, gave some great food recommendations too
reviews.negatives: Room was being cleaned a little late but we could leave our bags in there so no problem

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Clean, cosy, very spacious, comfortable room
Great location!
The staff were very helpful, we were able to borrow a kettle from the reception and even leave our luggage at the hotel after check out as we explored the Old Town.
reviews.negatives: Nothing really

reviews.title: Lovely place to stay
reviews.positives: Lovely and clean, close to the centre, nice big comfy bed. En-suite wet room. TV with working Netflix! Mini fridge.
reviews.negatives: Only downside, could have done with a kettle in the room.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Staff friendly and helpful
Tv was good bed comfy

reviews.title: The staff was very attentive
reviews.positives: The location was perfect, and the staff was very attentive and helpful.

reviews.title: The location very strategic neat to all the tailors and near to all the good foods stall. Very friendly and helpful staf
reviews.positives: The location very strategic neat to all the tailors and near to all the good foods stall.
reviews.negatives: Nothing much.

reviews.title: Great!
reviews.positives: Great place, nice staff and good location. Enjoyed my stay a lot here!
reviews.negatives: Unfortunately there are very thin windows leading to the hallway which lets in a lot of noise

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Very nice location and super helpful people.
reviews.negatives: Location

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: We had a really good time here, quality-price wise this is an amazing hotel. The girls at the front office are super accommodating and friendly, the room is spacious enough and the bathroom is clean and good-working. 10/10 in terms of price!
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great location, friendly staff - offering to book tours and organise washing etc. thank you

reviews.title: A great venue for family with comfortable stay
reviews.positives: Centrally located near the night market and bridge

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The two receptionists were amazing. They are friendly and very accommodating. They always had suggestions of activities to do for the day and they organized my airport shuttle, which made the journey simple. My room was clean and the bed was comfortable. There is a cafe right next door and many restaurants nearby.
reviews.negatives: If you want your rooms cleaned, you have to request this downstairs at the reception.

reviews.title: Extremely good value
reviews.positives: The staff were extremely friendly and helped with my washing which was helpful as I’m a solo traveller.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Friendly staff, close to the center and quiet at night. An ideal place to stay

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Nga in the reception was great. Great location a perfect relaitionship price quality. The place to sleep in Hoi An.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Good location and great value for money. The staff are so helful, making our stay very comfortable. The second time stay here, I’ll definitely will be back.

reviews.title: Clean room, good service, good location
reviews.positives: Good location

reviews.title: I enjoyed my stay at golden sun hotel.
reviews.negatives: The staff was very helpful

reviews.title: Great, lovely location, amazing staff
reviews.positives: prime location, super clean, super friendly and helful staff.

reviews.title: Love this hotel❤️
reviews.positives: I had a really fun and happy vacation staying at this hotel. Hotel location near the center of Old Town. Close to tourist attractions, entertainment, shopping and dining. The room is nice, clean, everyone is very friendly. I will come back to this place and recommend it to friends and relatives. Thanks a lot !

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Quarto bom!

reviews.title: Regular
reviews.positives: Excelente ubicacion y nos permitieron dejar las valijas antes del check in
reviews.negatives: Muy pequeña la habitacion y el baño. La pared llena de humedad. Si la rozabas quedabas todo manchado. La ducha mojaba todo el inodoro cuando te bañabas.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.negatives: No estaba del todo limpio, no realizaban limpieza todos los días sino muy superficial. Y las habitaciones tenían puertas de vidrio por lo que entraba luz desde temprano sin tener cortinas
